sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الجَدَّةُ تَدَّخِرُ النُّقُودَ فِي عُلْبَةٍ مَعْدَنِيَّةٍ قَدِيمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Baka je štedila novac u staroj metalnoj kutiji.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother saved money in an old metal box.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَضَعُ فِيهَا قَلِيلًا مِنَ النُّقُودِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Stavljala je u nju malo novca svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: She put a little money in it every day.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ سَنَةٍ فَتَحَتِ العُلْبَةَ وَكَانَتِ المَبَالِغُ كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Nakon godinu dana otvorila je kutiju i iznosi su bili veliki.
sentences.translationEn: After a year she opened the box and the amounts were large.
The grandmother gave some of it to her grandchildren as a gift.

sentences.translation: Unuci su se jako obradovali ovom poklonu.
sentences.translationEn: The grandchildren were very happy with this gift.
